title: Line Graphs and plotting material costs for multiple items

posts.author: RichT (Richard Turner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
Look for a way to create a dashboard to track the changes to different material costs.
We have created a board to enter all our material deliveries. On here we record and calculate costs per ton and different grades of material. How can we plot the rise and fall of different sheet thickness/grades costs?
We looking for a line chart plotting the change in material costs for varies items ie 5mm & 6mm over the months.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Richard,

Plotting and creating the graph depends on the columns you’re using to track those material costs. Have you experimented using the chart widget in the dashboards and plotting the X/Y axis with your the specific columns? You’re welcome to share screenshot of your board or the chart, if you’re running into some issues getting this set up!
